basic_details.job_title: NSI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Sugar Institute, Kanpur (NSI) Young Professional of Organic Chemistry Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nsi.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably specialized in organic chemistry from any recognized university/institute, One years' research experience in Organic chemistry
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably specialized in organic chemistry from any recognized university/institute. One year's research experience in Organic chemistry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nsi.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry post is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry, preferably specialized in organic chemistry, from a recognized university or institute, along with one year of research experience in Organic chemistry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional of Organic Chemistry position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional of Organic Chemistry role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional of Organic Chemistry post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional of Organic Chemistry post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NSI Young Professional of Organic Chemistry recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Sugar Institute, Kanpur located?
faq.answer: The National Sugar Institute, Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208017.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.
